creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
diff -ruN monit/Makefile monit-mp/Makefile
--- monit/Makefile      Tue Feb 20 00:17:44 2007
+++ monit-mp/Makefile   Tue Feb 20 00:21:18 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      monit
-PORTVERSION=   4.8.2
+PORTVERSION=   4.9
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.tildeslash.com/monit/dist/

diff -ruN monit/distinfo monit-mp/distinfo
--- monit/distinfo      Tue Feb 20 00:17:44 2007
+++ monit-mp/distinfo   Tue Feb 20 00:21:58 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (monit-4.8.2.tar.gz) = e7ad6056c71becf014653f6597d110ca
-SHA256 (monit-4.8.2.tar.gz) = 5fecb7a7e6e9ca86c565c202f4f56eaed92c0418187ca6675fd77194630f3e3c
-SIZE (monit-4.8.2.tar.gz) = 568557
+MD5 (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = bcbaab776a54d1e34e3a057c925de9ca
+SHA256 (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = 6963046fa976b682d27ac8e78cf7107d76c6907aef27b30f725f371ce64fb4bf
+SIZE (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = 573711
